nasb.text: But we said to my lord, ‘The lad cannot leave his father, for if he should leave his father, his father would die.’

esv.text: We said to my lord, ‘The boy cannot leave his father, for if he should leave his father, his father would die.’

cnv.text: 我們對我主說：‘那孩子是不能離開他父親的；如果離開了，他父親必定死。’

ccb.text: 我们对我主说，‘这孩子不能离开他父亲，他若离开，他父亲一定会死。’

csbs.text: 我们对我主说：‘那少年不能离开他父亲；如果离开了，他父亲就会死。’
